items.raw_desc: Húsvéti díszítés LENE BJERRE - Álló nyuszi, ezüst, 11 cm:Přineste i do svého domova atmosféru Velikonoc a ozdobte ho králíčkem v poloze ve stoje Serafina od známé dánské značky Lene Bjerre. Roztomilá figurka je vyrobena z polyresinu. Tato umělá pryskyřice je velmi odolná, zároveň však lehká, takže stříbrný králíček se jen tak nerozbije a bude milou dekorací, ať už jej umístíte na poličku, krb, parapet nebo na stůl. Detailní tvarování a vkusná, nenápadná barva potěší každé oko, které si potrpí na kvalitní design. Příjemným bonusem je, že figurky Lene Bjerre ve stříbrné barvě jsou jednoduché na údržbu a dají se snadno očistit. A fogkrémben található innovatív összetevők, mint a hidroxiapatit, erősítik a fogzománcot és védik a fogakat a károsodástól és túlérzékenységtől. items.raw_desc: Pulzoximéter Contec CMS50D:        The Contec CMS50D oximeter is suitable for use at home, on the road and in medical facilities. It is intended for non-invasive measurement of hemoglobin oxygen saturation, in the arethral part of the bloodstream, and heart rate. It is a suitable tool for asthmatics, people with heart disease, but also athletes and those who move at great heights. To measure, it uses two light rays with different wavelengths, which fall on a finger inserted into the device. It measures the saturation of the blood with oxygen in the range of 0-100% and the heart rate in the range of 30-235 beats per minute. items.raw_desc: Tolatóradar COMPASS Parkoló asszisztens 4 szenzor, hangjelzés:        Many drivers have problems with parking, especially in populated areas where it is not easy to find a nice place to park. However, this Compass assistant will help you with parking problems. It has 4 sensors and an audible signal of the distance from the obstacle . The sensor works on the principle of ultrasonic waves, which are transmitted by sensors in the rear bumper. The sensors are active as soon as reverse gear is engaged. You can tell the distance from an obstacle that may be out of your field of view by the intensity of the beeps. The volume of the signals can be adjusted.
